pycmplot
  • Contributing
  • View page source

Contributing

Bug reports, feature requests, and pull requests are welcome on the GitHub repository.

Reporting issues

Please open a GitHub issue and include:

  • Your pycmplot version (pip show pycmplot).

  • Python version and OS.

  • A minimal reproducible example, including the command or Python code used and the full error traceback.

  • A small example input file if the issue is data-related.

Development setup

git clone https://github.com/esohkevin/pycmplot.git
cd pycmplot
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -e ".[dev]"

Building the documentation locally

cd docs
pip install -r requirements.txt
make html
# open _build/html/index.html in your browser

Code style

pycmplot follows PEP 8. Please run flake8 and black before submitting a pull request:

black pycmplot/
flake8 pycmplot/

Docstrings

All public functions should use NumPy-style docstrings. See the existing modules for examples.
